productDisplayName: Nike Women As Club Jerse White T-Shirts
description: Composition White and grey striped polo t-shirt made of 95% cotton and 5% spandex, has ribbed collar and cuffs and a two-button placket Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean A creative spin on a timeless style, the versatile nike Club jersey for women shakes up your look with bold stripes, a tailored cut and an iconic, eye-catching logo. The secret to this polo's versatility is in the subtlety of its cut, the fold of its collar, and the soft feel of its material. A tailored cut delivers a clean and customized look, while all over yarn-dyed stripes add a pop of color, taking the classic design in a whole new direction. short sleeves allow great range of motion and create casual, warm-weather style.
